---

**Security Enhancement Overview**
A clear description of the security improvement or threat detection capability

**Threat Scenarios Addressed**
List the attack patterns or security events this enhancement will detect/prevent

**Proposed Solution**
Technical approach to implement the security enhancement

**Integration Points**
- [ ] CloudWatch Logs
- [ ] Coralogix
- [ ] AWS WAF
- [ ] Network Firewall
- [ ] GuardDuty
- [ ] SNS Alerting
- [ ] Lambda Automation

**Priority Level**
High (Security critical)
